title: Killing Me
lyrics: Here comes the night again Here comes the moment of our forgiveness What happens if it's over before you get that point of view? What happens if I'm just gone from here and you never see me again? What happens then? What happens in the end? Cause right now you're just making me wanna die I wanna say goodbye to anything I ever wanted in this life Yeah, you're killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me inside Nowhere to hide Oh, you're killing me inside Killing me, killing me, never healing me, healing me, just killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me down, killing me, killing me, and killing me in each which way I wanna hide my friend And we all get the moment of saying goodbye to us But I can't let you kill this part of me, baby, I can't let you not heal all of me So I'm gon' dig in, I'm gon' weaken, I'm gon' beat it, I'm gon' be there Before you know it, throw my unconditioned, I don't care for you I'll see you at the end of the dune Cause you're killing me, killing me, yeah, you're killing me, killing me, never healing me, healing me, just killing me, killing me, yeah, killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, k-k-killing me, killing me always Anything I wanted to be, you just took and threw down Anything I wanted to be, you never wanted to be, proud to be next to me, proud to be anything but just what I can get from you, the gift that you see, it's killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, yeah, killing me, killing me inside I'm killing this moment, I'm killing this heart, cause I want to survive past you, yeah Don't be killing me, don't be killing me, should be healing me, healing me, not killing me, yeah All I know is death inside these doorsteps of my mind, my mind, nothing left inside my mind, ooh All I know is you're just killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me always inside You're never wanting more than this abstraction of your thought and your bliss, kill me, kill me, kill me, kill me, kill me, kill me Kill me, you killed me once, you killed me twice, I'll take everything away from my life, no part wise, no line wise All through the desert of time, I'll ride freestyle rocks to throw you off your grind Every little song will be me killing me, killing me, yeah, every single part of you is healing me, not killing, not killing, inocular, vernacular, it kills me When you can't say what you wanna say, all you want is to me to go down the drain, down the drain All you want to see me is me not be the same, even if you love that me it no longer fits your piece Even if you love me it no longer fits your piece, I can't fit inside that puzzle of your life, I'll die in the end anyways You're killing me, killing me, just killing me, killing me, there's no way you can heal this now Why do you want this? Why do you want this? Just to stop me, just to hurt me, just to battle the thing inside me Can't kill what I was, can't kill what you brought up, because I no longer fit your glove Oh, oh Oh, oh Take a second to think about it, say oh Oh, oh Oh, oh Oh, oh

lyricsSegments.text: Here comes the night again
Here comes the moment of our forgiveness
What happens if it's over before you get that point of view?
What happens if I'm just gone from here and you never see me again?
What happens then?
What happens in the end?
Cause right now you're just making me wanna die
I wanna say goodbye to anything I ever wanted in this life
Yeah, you're killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me inside
Nowhere to hide
Oh, you're killing me inside

Killing me, killing me, never healing me, healing me, just killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me down, killing me, killing me, and killing me in each which way I wanna hide my friend
And we all get the moment of saying goodbye to us
But I can't let you kill this part of me, baby, I can't let you not heal all of me
So I'm gon' dig in, I'm gon' weaken, I'm gon' beat it, I'm gon' be there
Before you know it, throw my unconditioned, I don't care for you
I'll see you at the end of the dune

Cause you're killing me, killing me, yeah, you're killing me, killing me, never healing me, healing me, just killing me, killing me, yeah, killing me, killing me, killing, killing me, killing me, k-k-killing me, killing me always
Anything I wanted to be, you just took and threw down

Anything I wanted to be, you never wanted to be, proud to be next to me, proud to be anything but just what I can get from you, the gift that you see, it's killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, yeah, killing me, killing me inside
I'm killing this moment, I'm killing this heart, cause I want to survive past you, yeah
Don't be killing me, don't be killing me, should be healing me, healing me, not killing me, yeah
All I know is death inside these doorsteps of my mind, my mind, nothing left inside my mind, ooh
All I know is you're just killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me, killing me always inside
You're never wanting more than this abstraction of your thought and your bliss, kill me, kill me, kill me, kill me, kill me, kill me
Kill me, you killed me once, you killed me twice, I'll take everything away from my life, no part wise, no line wise
All through the desert of time, I'll ride freestyle rocks to throw you off your grind
Every little song will be me killing me, killing me, yeah, every single part of you is healing me, not killing, not killing, inocular, vernacular, it kills me
When you can't say what you wanna say, all you want is to me to go down the drain, down the drain
All you want to see me is me not be the same, even if you love that me it no longer fits your piece
Even if you love me it no longer fits your piece, I can't fit inside that puzzle of your life, I'll die in the end anyways
You're killing me, killing me, just killing me, killing me, there's no way you can heal this now
Why do you want this?
Why do you want this?
Just to stop me, just to hurt me, just to battle the thing inside me
Can't kill what I was, can't kill what you brought up, because I no longer fit your glove
Oh, oh
Oh, oh
